name: dual-sub-jellyfin
description: Show two subtitle tracks simultaneously on Jellyfin with selectable text for Yomitan/Migaku.

scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.zip:chrome: npm run build:chrome && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../../releases/dual-sub-jellyfin-chrome.zip .
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../../releases/dual-sub-jellyfin-firefox.zip .
scripts.zip:all: mkdir -p releases && npm run zip:chrome && npm run zip:firefox
